label: Browser, desktop & computer-use agents

node.label: Browser, desktop & computer-use agents
node.definition: Computer-use agents perceive graphical interfaces and operate browsers, desktops, mobile applications, or remote environments through bounded actions.
node.why_it_matters: This system is an application boundary where technical capability, evidence, safety controls, economics, and user workflow must succeed together.
examples: workflows combining Browser, desktop & computer-use agents with Autonomous software-engineering agents
workflows combining Browser, desktop & computer-use agents with Multimodal foundation models
workflows combining Browser, desktop & computer-use agents with Tool use & function calling
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Autonomous software-engineering agents, Multimodal foundation models.
